subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard and thy devotion is manifest. We beseech God that He may graciously assist thee in this matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت باصغا فائز و اقبالت مشهود از حق میطلبیم ترا تایید فرماید بر امریکه
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
